scenarios.description: visitor.head removes first of two siblings exercises removal branch where nextSibling != null
scenarios.precondition: Element root with two children A and B
scenarios.expectedResult: Only B is visited (head:root, head:B, tail:B, tail:root), A removed before tail, no tail:A
pseudocode: public void head(Node node, int depth) {
public void tail(Node node, int depth) {}
// removed A in head, so only B is traversed
// Expected calls: head:div:0, head:span:1, tail:span:1, tail:div:0

scenarios.description: visitor.head replaces only child triggers replacement branch and continues traversal
scenarios.precondition: Element root with single child C
scenarios.expectedResult: Child replaced by D, traversal continues on replacement D (head:root, head:D, tail:D, tail:root)
pseudocode: public void head(Node node, int depth) {
public void tail(Node node, int depth) {}
// Expected calls: head:div:0, head:span:1, tail:span:1, tail:div:0
